## Scope

- [ ] This PR implements tasks already listed in the track `plan.md`.
- [ ] This PR does not change the approved track scope without updating Conductor context first.
- [ ] External gates are separated from repo-local proof.

## Verification

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests scripts`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check src tests scripts`
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] Mojo/Pixi checks run, or exact external gate recorded.
- [ ] `conductor-review` run for the relevant phase or track scope.
